title: No Eyes - Radio Edit
lyrics:
2 ContributorsNo Eyes - Radio Edit Lyrics
It's a lonely night
Everybody's happy
Been turning around
Looking for a friendly light
But I see nothing

No eyes
No eyes on me

So many maybes
So many ways
So many ladies
So many men
So many maybes
So many ways
So many ladies
So many men

It's a lonely night
Everybody's happy
Been turning around
Looking for a friendly light
But I see nothing

No eyes
No eyes on me
No eyes on me
Near me

Can you see me lying?
Can you see why I contained?
Can you feel me thinking?
Would you save me if I fail?
I would love to love you
I would love to be your man
But the loneliness, please leave me

No eyes
No eyes (no eyes)
No eyes
No eyes on me

So many maybes
So many ways
So many ladies
So many men
So many maybes
So many ways
So many ladies
So many men
